description: There are a couple of reasons to include this belt in your wardrobe: the soft suede is a nice change of pace from full grain leather, and the classic good looks will complement any pair of pants. This suede- leather belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length: 80 cms Made of suede-leather for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand name in metallic studs embossed in the middle Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Use a leather conditioner to protect the leather
